description: WorkOS provides enterprise authentication and identity infrastructure for SaaS applications, including user management, enterprise SSO, directory sync, authorization, audit logs, and related admin tooling. It also offers AI-agent access to account management through a hosted MCP server.
summary: WorkOS exposes a REST API at https://api.workos.com, a hosted Management MCP server at https://mcp.workos.com/mcp, and a WorkOS CLI distributed via npm; the REST API uses bearer secret API keys, while the MCP server and CLI use WorkOS OAuth/dashboard sign-in.
